page_content:
Formerly: SPCH768.

COMM769 Professional Practice Forum in Interpreting: Workplace Processes and Procedures (1-2 Credits)

Provides in-depth exploration of processes and procedures in public service, legal, and political settings where interpreting services are commonplace. Enables students to make informed career plans and choices. Empowers participants by helping to establish and reinforce identity as a professional interpreter, develop specializations, and pursue professional and career development opportunities through interaction with members of the profession, professional organizations, and institutions in the language industry.
